properties.remark: A ONE FOOT DIAMETER ASPEN TREE FELL AT THE STAR VALLEY RANCH.
GOLF BALL SIZE HAIL AT THE FT. PHIL KEARNEY HISTORICAL SITE.
WYDOT REPORTED BASEBALL SIZE HAIL ALONG INTERSTATE 90 AT MP42 AT THE JOHNSON/SHERIDAN COUNTY LINE. REPORT INDICATED 6 BROKEN CAR WINDSHIELDS.
HAILSTONES AT LEAST 1 INCH IN DIAMETER. HOUSE SCREEN TORE UP DUE TO WIND AND HAIL.
WIND PICKED UP AN OLD 18-WHEELER SLEEPER CAB AND BLEW IT ACROSS THE CORRALS.
ANEMOMETER AT LANDFILL NORTH OF BASIN RECORDED A WIND GUST TO 70 MPH.
61 MPH WIND GUST OBSERVED AT THE SNOW SPRINGS CREEK RAWS.
SEVEN POWER POLES BLOWN DOWN AT POINT OF ROCKS.
SEVERAL PUBLIC REPORTS OF TORNADO NEAR HIGHWAY 310 MM 225
HAIL FELL FROM APPROXIMATELY 2-215 PM WITH STONES BETWEEN 1 AND 2 INCHES IN DIAMETER.
WHITE COLORED FUNNEL CLOUD WITNESSED AT THE SAME TIME.
